calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-12-2002 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause assigned to Dept. 218 from Dept. 206 for Unlawful Detainer Prove-Up hearing. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Lewis Gillian. Marc Seidenfeld, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff, Anthony Zorich and there being no appearance by Defendants, Shirley Lewis and Ralp[h Lewis who were properly notice of the hearing, the matter proceeded as an uncontested matter. The following exhbits were introduced, marked for identification and moved into evidence: 1) Trustee Deed Upon Sale; 2) Three Day Notice to Quit; 3) Proof of Service. On the basis of evidence presented, the Court ruled as follows: Judgment entered for Plaintiff, Anthony Zorich and against Defendants, Shirley and Ralph Lewis, restitution of the premises located at 446 Arch Street, San Francisco for rental damages in the amount of $6.100.00 and for costs in the amount of $246.50. Order signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-09-2002 Assigned To Trial Court
